public final class PackageFactoryTest extends PackageLoadingTestCase {

* A {@link PackageFactory.BuilderForTesting} that also allows specification of some skyframe
/** Holds the {@link BuilderFactoryForTesting} to be used by tests. */
* top-level macro on the call stack, if its value can be determined statically (see {@link
* PackageFactory#checkBuildSyntax}), or just the name of the target otherwise.
* instances. Intended to only be used by unit tests.
* A builder for {@link Package} objects. Only intended to be used by {@link PackageFactory} and
*       post-factum, after the package has been built. The intent is to enforce code health
* @param loadTimeNanos the wall time, in ns, that it took to load the package. More precisely,
*     this is the wall time of the call to {@link PackageFactory#createPackageFromAst}. Notably,
*     this does not include the time to read and parse the package's BUILD file, nor the time to
*       case of a BUILD file edit that doesn't change a glob expression), whereas invoking the
*       package loading machinery in {@link PackageFactory} with a {@link NonSkyframeGlobber}
*       would naively re-evaluate globs when re-evaluating the BUILD file.

*
